name: Agent Loop
description: Autonomous agent that loops between LLM and tools until task completion.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of iterations the agent can run before stopping. Prevents infinite loops.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the LLM can generate in a single response.

temperature.description: Controls randomness in LLM output. Higher values (0.8-1.0) make output more random, lower (0.0-0.3) make it more deterministic.

max_llm_retries.description: Number of times to retry the LLM call if it fails due to rate limits or transient errors.

retry_delay.description: Delay in seconds between LLM retry attempts.

tool_error_strategy.description: How to handle tool errors: 'continue' (skip failed tool and proceed), 'abort' (stop execution on error), or 'retry' (attempt tool call again).

timeout.description: Maximum time in seconds for the entire agent loop to complete before timing out.

include_plan_in_context.description: Whether to include the current plan in the LLM context for each iteration.

include_memory_context.description: Whether to include relevant memories in the LLM context to provide past information.

include_knowledge_context.description: Whether to include knowledge base results in the LLM context for RAG.

include_reasoning_context.description: Whether to include reasoning book entries in the LLM context.

provides_nodes.name: Agent Loop
provides_nodes.description: Autonomous agent that loops between LLM and tools until no more tool calls.

provides_nodes.name: RLM Agent Loop
provides_nodes.description: Recursive Language Model agent for processing arbitrarily long inputs via REPL environment. Enables handling of inputs exceeding normal context limits.

provides_nodes.name: REPL Environment
provides_nodes.description: Initializes a persistent REPL state for RLM processing. Extracts user input and stores it as a variable outside the context window.
